channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: politics
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: politics

item.title: 7 most competitive Senate races in 2026
item.description: The race for key Senate contests in 2026 is already getting underway, with a few major potential candidates hinting they may join the race.
item.dc:creator: Jared Gans, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Zuckerberg dines with Trump in Mar-a-Lago
item.description: FORT LAUDERDALE, Fla. (AP) — Donald Trump dined on Wednesday with Meta CEO Mark Zuckerberg at the president-elect’s Mar-a-Lago club in Florida, bringing together the Facebook founder and the former president who was once banned from that social network.
item.dc:creator: ADRIANA GOMEZ LICON, Associated Press, NewsNation

item.title: Trump transition says Cabinet picks, appointees were targeted by bomb threats, swatting attacks
item.description: NEW YORK (AP) — A number of President-elect Donald Trump 's most prominent Cabinet picks and appointees have been targeted by bomb threats and “swatting attacks," Trump's transition team said Wednesday. The FBI said it was investigating.
item.dc:creator: JILL COLVIN and ALANNA DURKIN RICHER, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: End of Trump prosecutions renews scrutiny of DOJ's pace
item.description: Special counsel Jack Smith's move to dismiss Donald Trump's two federal indictments has sparked finger-pointing from those eager to see the president-elect held to account, with critics airing their frustrations at the Department of Justice (DOJ) and the courts for the anticlimactic end to the case.
item.dc:creator: Rebecca Beitsch, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Democrats in Pennsylvania had a horrible 2024 election. They say it's still a swing state
item.description: HARRISBURG, Pa. (AP) — The drubbing Democrats took in Pennsylvania in this year's election has prompted predictable vows to rebound, but it has also sowed doubts about whether Pennsylvania might be leaving the ranks of up-for-grabs swing states for a right-leaning existence more like Ohio's.
item.dc:creator: MARC LEVY, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: President Trump endorses Patronis & Fine for congressional seats
item.description: Two Florida leaders are already emerging as potential frontrunners to replace Former Congressman Matt Gaetz and current U.S. Representative Mike Waltz in D.C.
item.dc:creator: Mackenzie LaPorte, WFLA, NBC

item.title: Cheap Ozempic? How millions of Americans with obesity may get access to costly weight-loss drugs
item.description: WASHINGTON (AP) — Millions of obese Americans would get access to popular weekly injectables that would help them shed pounds quickly if a $ 35 billion proposal from the Biden administration is blessed by President-elect Donald Trump.
item.dc:creator: AMANDA SEITZ, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Appeals court agrees to end Trump’s classified documents case
item.description: The 11th Circuit Court of Appeals on Tuesday granted a request from special counsel Jack Smith to drop President-elect Trump’s Florida documents case, ending the battle to charge him over retaining records with classified markings after leaving office.
item.dc:creator: Rebecca Beitsch, NewsNation

item.title: Trump is promising big cuts. Impoundment is one axe he wants to wield
item.description: President-elect Donald Trump wants to roll back spending that Congress has already approved. But a 1974 law may stand in his way.
item.dc:creator: Franco Ordoñez, MPR News

item.title: Rand Paul: Denver mayor could be removed over deportation resistance
item.description: Denver Mayor Mike Johnston (D) has vowed to protect migrants in his community as the Trump transition team promises it will crack down on immigration.
item.dc:creator: Lauren Irwin, NewsNation

item.title: Here are the people Trump has picked for key positions so far
item.description: President-elect Donald Trump is filling key posts in his second administration, and it's shaping up much differently than his first. He's prioritizing loyalists for top jobs.
item.dc:creator: THOMAS BEAUMONT, Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: Applicants sue Minnesota’s Office of Cannabis Management over disqualification
item.description: The OCM turned to a lottery because more than 1,800 applicants had sought 282 licenses. This week, regulators disqualified two-thirds of the applicants for a variety of reasons.
item.dc:creator: Matt Sepic and Feven Gerezgiher, MPR News
